name: VB-3 home value edge 05 [2.5,3.5)
definition: bet HOME: odds_home in [2.5,3.5) AND edge_home >= 0.05

name: VB-4 home segdelta 08
definition: bet HOME: odds_home in [2.0,6.0) AND train (home_WR_segment - home_WR_global)(team_a) >= 0.08 (n_seg>=6)

name: VB-5 union edge|segdelta
definition: bet HOME: odds_home in [2.0,6.0) AND (edge_home>=0.10 OR home segdelta>=0.08)

name: VB-7 home longshot edge>=0
definition: bet HOME: odds_home in [4.0,6.0) AND edge_home >= 0

name: VB-8 home edge 10 [2.0,3.0)
definition: bet HOME: odds_home in [2.0,3.0) AND edge_home >= 0.10

name: VB-9 rebond prevL [2.5,4.0)
definition: bet HOME: odds_home in [2.5,4.0) AND team_a lost previous home match

name: VB-10 edge 10 + prevL
definition: bet HOME: odds_home in [2.0,6.0) AND edge_home>=0.10 AND lost previous home match
